task: Generate and store completed ethics submission Word documents from saved ResearchOps full ethics submission data.

operatingModel.traceDecision: Trace required because the branch starts with feature/.

implementation: Added checked-in copies of the supplied Research Ethics approval form DOCX template.
Added D1 migration 0026_ethics_submission_documents.sql for generated document metadata and route permissions.
Added ethics submission document service to generate a completed DOCX copy, store it in R2 and record metadata in D1.
Added Worker routes for creating and downloading generated ethics submission documents.
Updated the full ethics submission submit action to call the document generation endpoint before marking the submission version submitted.
Added visible GOV.UK status text for document generation success or failure.
Tightened the ethics next-steps outcome panel text sizing.

validation.details: Passed with existing repository warnings only.

validation.command: Playwright local preview side-panel typography inspection
validation.details: Confirmed the synced HTTPS preview loads study-ethics-risk-next-steps-20260704-17; outcome summary, tag and trigger text render at 16px/20px; and there is no horizontal overflow at 1272px width.

residualRisk: The supplied Word template has no content controls, so the generated ResearchOps submission content is appended as a completed-submission section.
Production deployment requires the RESEARCHOPS_DOCUMENTS_R2 bucket binding to exist.
Ethics advice and extra-control route progress still need a production-backed persistence follow-up.
